mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM artifacts WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM artifacts
AND new_artifact_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{newArtifactName}, '%')
AND new_artifact_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{newArtifactCode}, '%')
AND material1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{material1}, '%')
AND excavation_relic LIKE CONCAT('%', #{excavationRelic}, '%')
AND completeness LIKE CONCAT('%', #{completeness}, '%')
ORDER BY CAST(serial_number AS UNSIGNED) ASC
